theme: Linux navigatsiya — to'liq kun: drill, asosiy, troubleshooting, mini-loyiha

tasks.title: Qayerdaman?
tasks.why: Har ish 'qayerdaman' savolidan boshlanadi. pwd — yo'qolmaslikning birinchi qoidasi.

tasks.title: Atrofga qara
tasks.why: ls -la — yashirin fayllar bilan birga hamma narsani ko'rsatadi. Ko'p ish shu yerда boshlanadi.
steps: Hamma narsani (yashirin ham) ko'r va saqla:  ls -la > listing.txt

tasks.title: 5 papka, 1 buyruq
tasks.why: Drill = muscle memory. Bitta buyruqda ko'p papka — kunlik tezlik.
steps: Bitta buyruqда 5 papka:  mkdir alfa bravo charli delta ekos
tasks.expect: drills/ ichida alfa bravo charli delta ekos papkalari
tasks.check: for x in alfa bravo charli delta ekos; do [ -d $LAB/drills/$x ] || exit 1; done

tasks.title: 10 fayl — brace expansion
tasks.why: {1..10} — bash kengaytmasi. Ko'p faylni bir zarbда yaratish.

tasks.title: Wildcard — faqat 1-3
tasks.why: Glob ([1-3]) — fayl nomlarini namuna bo'yicha tanlash. Kuchli ko'nikma.
steps: file1..file3 ni glob bilan ro'yxatla:  ls file[1-3].txt > glob.txt
tasks.check: grep -q file1.txt $LAB/drills/glob.txt && grep -q file3.txt $LAB/drills/glob.txt && ! grep -q file5.txt $LAB/drills/glob.txt

tasks.title: head/tail — oxirini ol
tasks.why: Katta logда oxirgi qatorlar eng muhim. tail — kunlik asbob.
steps: Oxirgi 2 qatorni ol:  tail -2 nums.txt > last.txt

tasks.title: Ish maydonini tayyorla
tasks.why: Har real loyiha tartibli papka tuzilmasidan boshlanadi — keyin chalkashmaysan.
steps: Bitta buyruqда 'project' va ichида src, logs, config yarat (mkdir -p)

tasks.title: Serverni hujjatla (inventory)
tasks.why: Ops'da birinchi ish — serverni hujjatlash: kim, qancha resurs, qaysi OS.
steps: Ichiga BUYRUQ bilan yoz:  hostname,  nproc,  cat /etc/os-release | head -1
Maslahat:  hostname >> ...  va  nproc >> ...  (>> qo'shib yozadi)
tasks.expect: host.txt ichида hostname va yadrolar soni bor

tasks.title: Loglardan xatolarni ajrat
tasks.why: Tunda servis yiqildi — minglab logdan faqat ERROR'larni ajratish kunlik ish.
steps: ERROR qatorlarini ajrat:  grep ERROR ~/devops/days/day-01/fixtures/app.log > project/logs/errors.txt

tasks.title: Audit — fayllarni sana
tasks.why: Inventarizatsiya: tizimda nechta shu turdagi fayl bor? find + wc — audit asbobi.
steps: ~/devops ichидаги BARCHA .md fayllar SONINI top (find + wc -l)

tasks.title: Disk holatini hujjatla
tasks.why: Disk to'lib qolsa servis o'ladi — disk holatini kuzatish kunlik ops ishi.

tasks.title: Eng katta loglarni top
tasks.why: Disk to'lganda — qaysi log eng katta? Hajm bo'yicha saralash asosiy ko'nikma.
steps: Eng katta 3 ta nomni project/logs/biggest.txt ga yoz

tasks.title: Birinchi skript
tasks.why: DevOps = avtomatlashtirish. Hammasi kichik skriptdan boshlanadi.

tasks.title: find + hajm filtri
tasks.why: find faqat nom emas, HAJM/VAQT bo'yicha ham qidiradi — real triage'da shart.
steps: /var/log da 50KB dan KATTA fayllar SONINI top:

tasks.title: Pichanда igna (grep -r)
tasks.why: Real ish: 'qaysi faylда bu matn bor?' — grep -r butun papkani qidiradi.
steps: haystack ichида 'needle' bor faylni top:  grep -rl needle ~/devops/days/day-01/fixtures/haystack > found.txt
Ko'r:  cat found.txt   (to'liq yo'l chiqishi kerak)

tasks.title: Buzuq skriptni tuzat
tasks.why: Debugging — DevOps ishining yuragi. Skript 'OK' chiqarishi kerak, lekin xato bor.
steps: Ichini och, sababini top (o'zgaruvchi nomida xato) va tuzat — 'OK' chiqsin

tasks.title: Disk to'lyapti — aybdorni top
tasks.why: 'Disk full!' signali keldi. Eng katta faylni tez topish — favqulodda ko'nikma.
steps: var-log-sim ичида eng KATTA faylni top (ls -S yoki du):

tasks.title: Loyiha skeletini qur
tasks.why: Mini-loyiha boshlandi: 'Server Inventory'. Avval tartibli tuzilma.

tasks.title: Tizim ma'lumotini yig'
tasks.why: Inventory yuragi: server kim, qancha CPU, qaysi OS.
steps: inventory/data/system.txt ga yoz: hostname, nproc, OS
tasks.expect: system.txt ичида hostname va yadro soni

tasks.title: Disk holatini yig'
tasks.why: Inventory'ga disk holati ham kerak — monitoring poydevori.

tasks.title: Log xulosasini chiqar
tasks.why: Inventory'ga loglar holati: nechta ERROR, nechta WARN.
steps: fixtures/app.log dan ERROR va WARN sonini hisobla (grep -c)

tasks.title: Hisobotni birlashtir (skript)
tasks.why: Loyiha yakuni: barcha qismlarni bitta skript bilan birlashtirib hisobot chiqarish.
steps: inventory/bin/report.sh yoz (#!/bin/bash): data va logs fayllarini birlashtirsin
Masalan:  echo '== INVENTORY =='; cat inventory/data/*.txt inventory/logs/*.txt
Ishga tushir va saqla:  bash inventory/bin/report.sh > inventory/report.txt
tasks.expect: report.txt ичида hostname va tizim ma'lumotlari

tasks.title: BOSS — 'Yashirin Arxiv' xazina ovi
tasks.why: Navigatsiya mahoratini to'liq sinash:  ls -a → grep -r → find → tail.

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
tasks.why: Tushuntira olish — haqiqatan tushunganingning yagona isboti.
steps: Bugun o'rgangan 3 narsani (navigatsiya, grep/find, redirection >) 3-4 jumlada ustozga ayt
